stepSchemas.description: Creates a payment charge (PaymentIntent) via the configured payment provider. Supports automatic and manual capture.

configFields.label: Payment Provider Module
configFields.description: Name of the payments.provider module instance to use

configFields.label: Amount (cents)
configFields.description: Charge amount in the smallest currency unit (e.g. cents for USD)

configFields.label: Currency
configFields.description: ISO 4217 currency code (e.g. usd). Falls back to provider default.

configFields.label: Customer ID
configFields.description: Provider customer ID to attach the charge to

configFields.label: Capture Method
configFields.description: Whether to capture funds immediately (automatic) or hold for manual capture later

configFields.label: Description
configFields.description: Optional description attached to the charge

outputs.description: Client secret for client-side confirmation (Stripe only)
Confirmed charge amount in smallest currency unit
Error message if the step failed; omitted on success

stepSchemas.description: Captures a previously authorised charge that was created with capture_method=manual.

configFields.label: Payment Provider Module
configFields.description: Name of the payments.provider module instance to use

configFields.label: Charge ID
configFields.description: The charge/PaymentIntent ID to capture

configFields.label: Capture Amount (cents)
configFields.description: Amount to capture. Defaults to full authorised amount when omitted.

outputs.description: Captured amount in smallest currency unit
Error message if the step failed; omitted on success

stepSchemas.description: Issues a full or partial refund for a completed charge.

configFields.label: Payment Provider Module
configFields.description: Name of the payments.provider module instance to use

configFields.label: Charge ID
configFields.description: The charge/PaymentIntent ID to refund

configFields.label: Refund Amount (cents)
configFields.description: Amount to refund in smallest currency unit. Defaults to full charge amount.

configFields.label: Reason
configFields.description: Optional refund reason (e.g. duplicate, fraudulent, requested_by_customer)

outputs.description: Error message if the step failed; omitted on success

stepSchemas.description: Calculates the fee breakdown for a given amount, returning the net contribution after processing and platform fees.

configFields.label: Payment Provider Module
configFields.description: Name of the payments.provider module instance to use

configFields.label: Amount (cents)
configFields.description: Gross amount in smallest currency unit

configFields.label: Currency
configFields.description: ISO 4217 currency code

configFields.label: Platform Fee (%)
configFields.description: Platform fee percentage (0-100). Defaults to 0.

outputs.description: Net amount after all fees (in cents)
Error message if the step failed; omitted on success

stepSchemas.description: Looks up an existing customer by email and creates one if not found (idempotent upsert).

configFields.label: Payment Provider Module
configFields.description: Name of the payments.provider module instance to use

configFields.label: Email
configFields.description: Customer email address

configFields.label: Name
configFields.description: Customer full name

outputs.description: Error message if the step failed; omitted on success

stepSchemas.description: Creates a new recurring subscription for a customer.

configFields.label: Payment Provider Module
configFields.description: Name of the payments.provider module instance to use

configFields.label: Customer ID
configFields.description: Provider customer ID

configFields.label: Price ID
configFields.description: Provider price/plan ID to subscribe to

outputs.description: Error message if the step failed; omitted on success

stepSchemas.description: Updates an existing subscription, e.g. to change the price/plan.

configFields.label: Payment Provider Module
configFields.description: Name of the payments.provider module instance to use

configFields.label: Subscription ID
configFields.description: Provider subscription ID to update

configFields.label: New Price ID
configFields.description: New provider price/plan ID to switch to

outputs.description: Error message if the step failed; omitted on success

stepSchemas.description: Cancels an active subscription immediately or at the end of the current billing period.

configFields.label: Payment Provider Module
configFields.description: Name of the payments.provider module instance to use

configFields.label: Subscription ID
configFields.description: Provider subscription ID to cancel

configFields.label: Cancel at Period End
configFields.description: When true, the subscription remains active until the end of the billing period

outputs.description: Error message if the step failed; omitted on success

stepSchemas.description: Creates a hosted checkout session URL that redirects the customer to the provider's payment page.

configFields.label: Payment Provider Module
configFields.description: Name of the payments.provider module instance to use

configFields.label: Customer ID
configFields.description: Provider customer ID (optional for guest checkout)

configFields.label: Price ID
configFields.description: Provider price/product ID for the checkout item

configFields.label: Success URL
configFields.description: URL to redirect to after successful payment

configFields.label: Cancel URL
configFields.description: URL to redirect to when the customer cancels

configFields.label: Mode
configFields.description: Checkout session mode

outputs.description: Hosted checkout page URL to redirect the customer to
Error message if the step failed; omitted on success

stepSchemas.description: Creates a customer billing-portal session URL where the customer can manage their subscriptions and payment methods.

configFields.label: Payment Provider Module
configFields.description: Name of the payments.provider module instance to use

configFields.label: Customer ID
configFields.description: Provider customer ID

configFields.label: Return URL
configFields.description: URL to redirect to after the customer exits the portal

outputs.description: Billing portal URL to redirect the customer to
Error message if the step failed; omitted on success

stepSchemas.description: Validates an inbound webhook payload signature and returns the parsed event. Reads signature headers from the pipeline context or config.

configFields.label: Payment Provider Module
configFields.description: Name of the payments.provider module instance to use

configFields.label: Request Body
configFields.description: Raw webhook payload body (falls back to current.payload)

configFields.label: Stripe-Signature Header
configFields.description: Stripe webhook signature header value

configFields.label: Stripe Signature (alias)
configFields.description: Alternative key for Stripe-Signature

configFields.label: Webhook Signature (legacy alias)
configFields.description: Legacy alias for Stripe-Signature; mapped to Stripe-Signature header automatically

configFields.label: PayPal-Transmission-Id Header
configFields.description: PayPal webhook transmission ID header

configFields.label: PayPal-Transmission-Sig Header
configFields.description: PayPal webhook signature header

configFields.label: PayPal-Cert-Url Header
configFields.description: PayPal webhook certificate URL header

configFields.label: PayPal-Auth-Algo Header
configFields.description: PayPal webhook auth algorithm header

configFields.label: PayPal-Transmission-Time Header
configFields.description: PayPal webhook transmission time header

outputs.description: Error message if the step failed; omitted on success

stepSchemas.description: Initiates a platform-level transfer of funds to a connected account.

configFields.label: Payment Provider Module
configFields.description: Name of the payments.provider module instance to use

configFields.label: Amount (cents)
configFields.description: Transfer amount in smallest currency unit

configFields.label: Currency
configFields.description: ISO 4217 currency code

configFields.label: Destination Account ID
configFields.description: Connected account or PayPal ID to transfer funds to

configFields.label: Description
configFields.description: Optional transfer description

outputs.description: Error message if the step failed; omitted on success

stepSchemas.description: Initiates a payout of funds to an external bank account.

configFields.label: Payment Provider Module
configFields.description: Name of the payments.provider module instance to use

configFields.label: Amount (cents)
configFields.description: Payout amount in smallest currency unit

configFields.label: Currency
configFields.description: ISO 4217 currency code

configFields.label: Destination Bank ID
configFields.description: Bank account or payout destination ID

configFields.label: Description
configFields.description: Optional payout description

outputs.description: Error message if the step failed; omitted on success

stepSchemas.description: Lists invoices for a customer, with optional status and limit filters.

configFields.label: Payment Provider Module
configFields.description: Name of the payments.provider module instance to use

configFields.label: Customer ID
configFields.description: Provider customer ID to filter invoices by

configFields.label: Limit
configFields.description: Maximum number of invoices to return

configFields.label: Status Filter
configFields.description: Filter by invoice status (e.g. paid, open, draft)

outputs.description: Error message if the step failed; omitted on success

stepSchemas.description: Attaches an existing payment method to a customer.

configFields.label: Payment Provider Module
configFields.description: Name of the payments.provider module instance to use

configFields.label: Customer ID
configFields.description: Provider customer ID

configFields.label: Payment Method ID
configFields.description: Provider payment method ID to attach

outputs.description: Error message if the step failed; omitted on success

stepSchemas.description: Lists payment methods attached to a customer, with optional type filter.

configFields.label: Payment Provider Module
configFields.description: Name of the payments.provider module instance to use

configFields.label: Customer ID
configFields.description: Provider customer ID

configFields.label: Type Filter
configFields.description: Payment method type to filter by (e.g. card, sepa_debit)

outputs.description: JSON-encoded array of payment method objects
Error message if the step failed; omitted on success
